originalTitle: Bread dresses and gowns inspired by cathedrals at Nigeria fashion spectacle
title: Bread dresses and gowns inspired by cathedrals at Nigeria fashion spectacle
content: Celebrities, filmmakers and creators put up a performance at Africa's biggest night of film and fashion.

originalTitle: South Africa president faces call to resign after court ruling
title: South Africa president faces call to resign after court ruling
content: The Constitutional Court says MPs were was wrong to block impeachment proceedings against Cyril Ramaphosa.

originalTitle: 'I'd rather live in hiding in the US than return to Somalia'
title: 'I'd rather live in hiding in the US than return to Somalia'
content: Fear and uncertainty linger for Somali migrants in Minnesota despite a legal reprieve.

originalTitle: Football on ruins: Gaza’s orphans find refuge on the pitch
title: Football on ruins: Gaza’s orphans find refuge on the pitch
content: A Gaza teenager orphaned by an Israeli attack finds refuge in football amid the decimation of Palestinian sports.

originalTitle: Stories of those killed in a single day of Israeli strikes on Lebanon
title: Stories of those killed in a single day of Israeli strikes on Lebanon
content: Israeli strikes have killed at least 39 people in a single day of attacks across Lebanon during a so-called ‘ceasefire.’

originalTitle: Jorge Martin wins his first Aprilia Grand Prix at French MotoGP
title: Jorge Martin wins his first Aprilia Grand Prix at French MotoGP
content: Ex-MotoGP world champion now only a single point behind Aprilia teammate Marco Bezzecchi in the riders' standings.

originalTitle: Countries airlift nationals evacuated from from virus-hit cruise ship
title: Countries airlift nationals evacuated from from virus-hit cruise ship
content: Spanish passengers are the first to leave the MV Hondius, after an outbreak saw three people die and several infected.

originalTitle: Army parachutes onto remote island to help Briton with suspected hantavirus
title: Army parachutes onto remote island to help Briton with suspected hantavirus
content: The specialist team parachuted onto Tristan da Cunha, a remote British overseas territory, to treat them.

originalTitle: Iran sends response to US proposals to end war
title: Iran sends response to US proposals to end war
content: No details have been released of Iran's response - or the US proposals - designed to bring the war to an end.

originalTitle: Manchester City beat stubborn Brentford to keep title race alive
title: Manchester City beat stubborn Brentford to keep title race alive
content: Goals from Jeremy Doku, Erling Haaland and Omar Marmoush help Manchester City beat Brentford 3-0 at the Etihad Stadium to secure a vital win in the Premier League title race, as City move two points behind leaders Arsenal with three games remaining.

originalTitle: Bournemouth stay in European hunt with win over Fulham in fiery contest
title: Bournemouth stay in European hunt with win over Fulham in fiery contest
content: Rayan scores the only goal in a game where both sides are shown a straight red card, as Bournemouth beat Fulham to stay sixth in the Premier League table.

originalTitle: Brighton keep European hopes alive with comfortable win over Wolves
title: Brighton keep European hopes alive with comfortable win over Wolves
content: Brighton produce a comfortable 3-0 win over bottom of the table Wolves at the AMEX Stadium, to move up to seventh in the Premier League table.
